items.title: Solstice Is Getting Ready for a Nuclear-Power Surge. The Stock Is Up.
items.description: The Honeywell spinoff, is increasing production of uranium hexafluoride, an intermediate product between uranium ore and nuclear fuel pellets.

items.title: Jim Cramer on TAT Technologies (TATT): “I Think That That Is Exactly Where To Be”
items.description: TAT Technologies Ltd. (NASDAQ:TATT) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer looked at recently. Noting the presence of an “aging global fleet of aircraft and the backlog of Boeing,” a caller mentioned that the company is benefiting from it. Cramer commented: Yeah, that is a really interesting stock. I know it’s moved up a lot, […]
